title: leymus littoralis
intro: Leymus littoralis, also known as Glaucous Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Leymus littoralis can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
